ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code for the country */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Average latitude of the country */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Average longitude of the country */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Primary time zone of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_icons" (
  "icon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather icon */,
  "icon_description" TEXT /* Description of the weather icon */,
  "icon_path" TEXT /* File path to the weather icon image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("icon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precipitation_types" (
  "precip_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precipitation type */,
  "precip_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the precipitation type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precip_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the country the region belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Average latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Average longitude of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "forecast_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the forecast */,
  "forecast_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the forecast */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the forecast was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the forecast was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles_map" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
column_names: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code for the country
Primary time zone of the country
Unique identifier for each weather icon
File path to the weather icon image
Unique identifier for each precipitation type
Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, researcher, admin)
Date and time the user account was created
Date and time the user account was last updated
Unique identifier for the country the region belongs to
Date and time the forecast was created
Date and time the forecast was last updated
